name: 0001 | Preserve Original/Small Detail Only
prompt: make only the requested small detail change; preserve the original subject identity, exact face, expression, pose, anatomy, clothing except the requested detail, lighting, background, camera angle, composition, colors, proportions, and object placement; do not reinterpret or redesign anything outside the requested edit
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, different person, changed pose, changed background, new objects, missing objects

name: 0002 | Preserve Original/Maximum Fidelity
prompt: use the source image as a strict structural reference; keep geometry, framing, perspective, identity, facial structure, hairstyle, wardrobe, environment, lighting direction, shadows, and color relationships as close to the original as possible; alter only the explicitly requested element
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, composition drift, identity drift, restyled clothing, relighting

name: 0003 | Style Transfer/Subtle Anime
prompt: apply a subtle high-quality anime rendering style while preserving the exact original composition, pose, identity, facial structure, expression, hairstyle, clothing design and colors, lighting, background layout, camera framing, proportions, and object placement; only change rendering into clean anime linework and soft cel shading
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, changed face, changed outfit, chibi, exaggerated anatomy, different background

name: 0004 | Style Transfer/Anime Strong Fidelity
prompt: convert the source into polished anime key art while locking the original scene structure, subject identity, pose, facial features, expression, wardrobe, lighting direction, background details, framing, and color layout; no redesigns or added objects
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, character redesign, different camera angle, new props, missing details

name: 0005 | Style Transfer/Comic Ink
prompt: convert only the rendering medium into refined comic-book inks and controlled print color; preserve all original shapes, identity, pose, wardrobe, composition, lighting relationships, and background content
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, changed anatomy, new costume, altered layout

name: 0006 | Style Transfer/Oil Painting
prompt: translate the image into a classical oil-painting surface with layered brushwork while preserving subject identity, exact composition, pose, clothing, lighting, color relationships, and environmental details
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, historical redesign, changed face, missing background

name: 0007 | Style Transfer/Watercolor
prompt: apply delicate watercolor texture and linework only; keep the original face, body, pose, clothing, camera, lighting, background, and all object positions unchanged
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, washed-out missing detail, composition drift

name: 0008 | Color Edit/Single Garment Color
prompt: change only the specified garment color; preserve garment design, fabric, folds, body, face, pose, lighting, background, composition, and every other color unless physically affected by reflections
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, new clothing, altered garment shape, global recolor

name: 0009 | Color Edit/Hair Color Only
prompt: change only the hair color requested; preserve hairstyle, strand layout, face, skin, expression, pose, wardrobe, environment, and lighting
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, new hairstyle, changed face, wig-like hair

name: 0010 | Color Edit/Eye Color Only
prompt: change only the iris color requested; keep eye shape, gaze, eyelids, face, expression, skin, lighting, and all other details identical
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, changed eyes, different gaze, makeup changes

name: 0011 | Object Edit/Add One Object
prompt: add only the requested object in the specified location with matching perspective, lighting, scale, reflections, and shadows; preserve every existing subject and scene detail unchanged
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, extra objects, moved objects, composition change

name: 0012 | Object Edit/Remove One Object
prompt: remove only the specified object and reconstruct the hidden background naturally; preserve all other subjects, objects, framing, lighting, textures, and colors
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, removed wrong object, changed scene

name: 0013 | Wardrobe Edit/Replace One Garment

negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, malformed anatomy, distorted face, bad hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, logo, full outfit redesign, body change
